issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving double tasks in post-referral workflow
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were generating duplicate tasks across the post-referral and other workflows. The issue was traced to a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. Madelaine worked with HubSpot support and confirmed the issue was resolved.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or delete the extra duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to reference the old LO rather than the newly assigned one. The issue was identified on a deal where LO Paul remained in outgoing emails instead of the updated LO Julie Yocum. Luis resolved the issue.
issues.workaround: For deals where the LO was changed during the impact window, manually resend any automated agent-facing emails with the correct LO information.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping for closed lost and transferred deals
issues.desc: Deals marked as closed lost or transferred continued to receive post-referral workflow check-in tasks instead of being unenrolled. The workflow lacked proper suppression filters for these terminal deal stages. Madelaine made a tweak to the filters to resolve it.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss or delete any check-in tasks that were incorrectly generated for deals marked closed lost or transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage is flipped back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was marked Offer Accepted, reverted to a prior stage, and then moved back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger on the second transition. The root cause was that 'deal stage = offer accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion. Madelaine updated the workflow to include it as a re-enrollment trigger.
issues.workaround: For any deals that went through a second Offer Accepted transition during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks, manually enroll the deal into the TC workflow.

issues.title: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow
issues.desc: MRC deals being updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow or associated tasks. Madelaine engaged HubSpot support and confirmed the issue was resolved after speaking with them. The root cause was not explicitly stated.
issues.workaround: For MRC deals moved to Offer Accepted during the impact window that did not receive TC tasks, manually enroll them into the TC workflow.
